title: cymbidium umbellatum
intro: Cymbidium umbellatum, also known as the East Himalayan cymbidium, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium umbellatum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cymbidium umbellatum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, where it is steeped in hot water to extract its medicinal compounds.
